Hi Nick, my name is Dan Saunders and I am the owner/operator of Window & Solar Care. Thanks for selecting me to give you a quote on cleaning your windows. My typical service includes: On the inside; Vacuuming all inside tracks, wipe the sills, clean the inside windows. On the outside; brush the outside tracks, cobweb clean around all window frames, dry brush both sides of the screens and finally clean the outside windows. My pricing is as follows: $5.00/pane (not window) to clean the glass inside and out. $20.00 flat fee to vacuum inside tracks. $20.00 flat fee to dry brush (clean) the  screens. $25.00 total for each set of Regular glass sliding doors.

Dan Saunders
